meta.title: Report Writing Phrase Banks
meta.description: Functional phrases for Cambridge B2/C1 report writing organized by section — amalgamated from all source materials
meta.structure: Introduction → Current Situation / Overview → Problems / Criticism → Recommendations → Conclusion

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The aim of this report is to assess the school facilities
The purpose of this report is to evaluate current provision
This report provides an overview of the main school facilities
This report seeks to examine the condition of school buildings and resources
The relevant information was obtained through surveys of students
Data was gathered from questionnaires distributed to over 200 students
This report is based on feedback from the student council survey

subcategories.subtitle: Balanced observations
phrases: It is generally agreed that the classrooms are in good condition
On the whole, most students felt the facilities were adequate
The consensus was that IT equipment meets basic requirements
By far the best aspect is the recently upgraded computer lab
One positive aspect is the well-equipped sports hall
A definite strength was the helpful and knowledgeable staff
It should be emphasized that the library provides a quiet study environment

subcategories.subtitle: Identifying concerns
phrases: However, one major concern expressed by students is the overcrowded library
By far the worst aspect is the limited seating during exam periods
A significant concern amongst students was that toilet facilities are outdated
This is mainly due to the fact that there is insufficient space
As a result, many students cannot study effectively after school
A persistent problem is the weak Wi-Fi coverage in some areas
Many students expressed frustration with the poor heating in older buildings

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing solutions
phrases: One key recommendation would be to extend library opening hours
I would strongly recommend adding more study desks and chairs
In order to improve student access, it would be advisable to renovate the toilets
To improve the situation, it would be a good idea to upgrade the Wi-Fi network
If this change is made, students would benefit enormously
A practical step would be to introduce a booking system for study spaces
The school should consider investing in additional seating capacity

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, these improvements would benefit students significantly
To sum up, the facilities are adequate but require targeted enhancements
In conclusion, addressing these issues should be a priority
Overall, these changes would make a real difference for students
On the whole, it was felt that the school provides a reasonable learning environment

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The aim of this report is to evaluate the two-week exchange programme
This report looks at the effectiveness of the Spain exchange visit
The purpose of this report is to assess learning outcomes for participants
This report is based on feedback from the 15 students who participated
The programme ran in March 2025 and involved students from both countries
The relevant information was obtained through participant interviews and surveys

subcategories.subtitle: Describing the experience
phrases: It was generally felt that host families were exceptionally welcoming
By far the best aspect was the authentic use of Spanish at mealtimes
One thing that worked really well was the cultural activities programme
The highlight was undoubtedly the daily Spanish lessons with local students
A definite strength was the variety of sports exchanges organized
Participants were especially impressed by the warmth of their host families
Overall, most students felt the accommodation exceeded expectations

subcategories.subtitle: Assessing what was gained
phrases: Spanish conversation skills improved dramatically during the programme
By far the most valuable outcome was real-life language practice
A significant concern was that some students felt underprepared initially
It must be stated that confidence in using the language authentically grew considerably
Many students reported that they developed lasting international friendships
The programme clearly demonstrated that immersion is more effective than classroom learning

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing improvements
phrases: I would strongly recommend continuing the exchange programme
One key recommendation would be to offer pre-departure language lessons
In order to prepare students better, it would be advisable to improve communication with host families
To improve the experience, it would be a good idea to increase the duration
If these changes are made, the educational benefits would be even greater
The school should consider making the programme available to more year groups

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, the programme represents an invaluable educational experience
To sum up, the language benefits far exceed what classroom learning can offer
In conclusion, this type of exchange should be continued and expanded
Overall, these improvements would make an already excellent programme even more effective
On the whole, it was felt that the experience was highly worthwhile

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The aim of this report is to assess the current sports facilities
This report examines provision for young people aged 14 to 18
The purpose of this report is to evaluate whether facilities meet youth needs
The report is based on feedback from 120 young people surveyed
Information was obtained through a youth survey conducted across the area
This report provides an overview of existing facilities and recommended improvements

subcategories.subtitle: Describing current provision
phrases: It was generally felt that the sports centre provides reasonable value
On the whole, the football pitch is well-maintained and popular
The consensus was that the basketball courts are in reasonable condition
One positive aspect is the swimming pool, which attracts many regular users
Overall, most users felt the facility offered a range of sporting options
A definite strength is the variety of facilities available under one roof

subcategories.subtitle: Identifying concerns
phrases: However, one major concern is the outdated gym equipment
By far the worst aspect is the opening hours, which do not suit students
A significant concern amongst teenagers was the high membership prices
This is mainly due to the fact that no student discount scheme exists
As a result, many young people feel excluded from regular use
A persistent problem is the lack of an online booking system
Many residents expressed dissatisfaction with the changing room facilities

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing solutions
phrases: One key recommendation would be to modernize the gym equipment urgently
I would strongly recommend extending evening opening until 9pm
In order to attract more young people, it would be advisable to introduce a student discount
To improve access, it would be a good idea to implement a mobile booking app
If these changes are made, youth participation could double
Local authorities should consider investing in renovating the changing rooms
A practical step would be to trial extended hours for one month

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, these changes would make a real difference to young residents
In conclusion, the sports centre is useful overall but access needs improvement
To sum up, targeted investment would significantly increase youth participation
Overall, implementing the recommendations above would improve the facility for all users
On balance, the centre has potential but requires modernization to serve young people effectively

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The aim of this report is to evaluate the three-day educational trip to Bath
This report looks at how successful the visit was and what could be improved
The purpose of this report is to assess the trip for future planning
The report is based on feedback from 32 Year 10 students who participated
The relevant information was obtained through post-trip surveys and discussions
This report covers accommodation, activities, and overall student experience

subcategories.subtitle: Describing the experience
phrases: Overall, participants felt the trip was well-organized and enjoyable
The highlight was undoubtedly the Roman Baths interactive tour
One thing that worked really well was the library workshop
By far the best aspect was the educational value of the historical sites
A definite strength was the clean and comfortable youth hostel accommodation
Students were especially impressed by the photography opportunities available
It was generally agreed that the walking tours were informative and engaging

subcategories.subtitle: Identifying concerns
phrases: However, a common complaint was the hostel's distance from the main sites
By far the worst aspect was the excessive time wasted on transport
A significant concern raised by many students was the length of some workshops
This is mainly due to the fact that accommodation was not centrally located
As a result, students arrived tired and had less energy for activities
Many participants expressed disappointment with the limited meal choices
Unfortunately, the tight schedule left little time for independent exploration

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing solutions
phrases: One key recommendation would be to book accommodation closer to the city centre
I would strongly recommend shortening workshop sessions to 45 minutes
In order to improve the experience, it would be advisable to allow some free time
To improve future trips, it would be a good idea to offer meal choices
If these changes are made, students would have a far more rewarding experience
Organizers should consider including more time for independent exploration
A practical step would be to plan earlier departures to reduce travel fatigue

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, future trips should continue with these adjustments
In conclusion, the trip was enjoyable overall but planning needs improvement
To sum up, the Roman Baths visit was outstanding and the format should be retained
Overall, these changes would make the trip a richer educational experience
On the whole, it was felt that similar trips are well worth organizing with modifications

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The purpose of this report is to review school library services
The aim of this report is to assess books, computers, and study spaces
This report is based on a survey of 150 library users
The relevant information was obtained through questionnaires and direct observation
This report examines current usage patterns and areas for improvement
Information was gathered from both regular users and occasional visitors

subcategories.subtitle: Describing what is available
phrases: It is generally agreed that the library provides a quiet study environment
On the whole, users were satisfied with the wide range of fiction and reference books
The consensus was that staff are helpful and knowledgeable
By far the best aspect is the well-maintained quiet study area
One positive aspect is the availability of 12 computers for research
A definite strength was the calm atmosphere maintained throughout the day
Overall, most users acknowledged that the library serves its intended purpose

subcategories.subtitle: Identifying concerns
phrases: However, one major concern expressed by students is that the library closes too early
By far the worst aspect is the insufficient seating during exam periods
A significant concern was that computers are often all occupied at peak times
This is mainly due to the fact that there are only 12 machines for the whole school
As a result, many students cannot access digital resources when they need them
A persistent problem is the lack of e-book or digital subscription access
Many students reported that the temperature is too cold in winter

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing solutions
phrases: One key recommendation would be to extend opening hours until at least 5:30pm
I would strongly recommend purchasing additional computers
In order to support exam preparation, it would be advisable to add temporary desks
To improve digital access, it would be a good idea to introduce an e-book subscription
If this change is made, students would have access to resources after school clubs
A practical step would be to introduce a booking system for computer terminals
The school should consider opening on Saturday mornings during exam season

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, these improvements are essential for students
In conclusion, the library provides good services but requires targeted enhancements
To sum up, extending hours and adding computers would make the biggest difference
Overall, these changes would significantly improve students' ability to study independently
On the whole, the library is valued but must evolve to meet modern student needs

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The aim of this report is to evaluate the work experience placement
This report examines the value of the two-week placement at Green Design Studios
The purpose of this report is to assess skills gained and recommend improvements
The relevant information was obtained through participant reflection and staff feedback
This report covers tasks undertaken, skills developed, and recommendations for future students
The placement took place in July 2024 in the role of junior marketing assistant

subcategories.subtitle: Describing the workplace
phrases: Overall, staff felt that the placement was well-organized and welcoming
One thing that worked really well was the variety of tasks assigned
The highlight was undoubtedly shadowing senior designers in client meetings
By far the best aspect was the supportive and friendly working environment
A definite strength was the opportunity to manage real social media accounts
It was generally agreed that the small team allowed for meaningful involvement
Most participants acknowledged that day-to-day tasks felt genuinely purposeful

subcategories.subtitle: Assessing what was gained
phrases: Communication skills improved significantly throughout the placement
By far the most valuable skill gained was understanding client needs
However, a common complaint was the repetitive nature of some administrative tasks
A significant concern was that some students lacked basic software knowledge beforehand
The experience clearly demonstrated that professional behaviour must be taught explicitly
Many students reported improved confidence in workplace communication

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing improvements
phrases: I would strongly recommend continuing this placement for future students
One key recommendation would be to prepare students with basic software skills beforehand
In order to improve the experience, it would be advisable to rotate tasks weekly
To improve the programme, it would be a good idea to include more varied responsibilities
If these changes are made, students would gain broader professional experience
Management should consider providing a structured weekly schedule for interns
A practical step would be to match student interests with specific departments

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, this placement offers valuable real-world experience
In conclusion, the placement works well overall but task variety needs improvement
To sum up, the programme should continue with the adjustments outlined above
Overall, students interested in creative industries would benefit greatly from this placement
On the whole, the experience was considered highly worthwhile by all participants

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The aim of this report is to assess the school cafeteria services
This report covers food quality, menu variety, service speed, and pricing
The purpose of this report is to evaluate student satisfaction with catering
The report is based on feedback from 180 students across all year groups
Information was collected through a questionnaire distributed to students and staff
This report identifies the main concerns and proposes practical improvements

subcategories.subtitle: Balanced observations
phrases: It was generally felt that the cafeteria provides reasonable value for money
On the whole, the salad bar was considered the most popular feature
The consensus was that seating capacity is adequate for most lunchtimes
One positive aspect is the friendly and efficient serving staff
Overall, most students acknowledged that three hot meal options are available daily
A definite strength is the reasonable pricing compared to nearby options

subcategories.subtitle: Identifying concerns
phrases: However, one major concern expressed by students is the lack of menu variety
By far the worst aspect is the absence of vegetarian options on most days
A significant concern amongst students was the long queuing times at peak lunch
This is mainly due to the fact that the same menu repeats weekly
As a result, many students choose to skip lunch or leave the school premises
A persistent problem is that food is often cold by the time it is served
Many students expressed frustration with the limited choice available

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing solutions
phrases: One key recommendation would be to introduce daily vegetarian and vegan options
I would strongly recommend expanding the menu to five or six choices per day
In order to reduce queues, it would be advisable to extend the lunch period
To improve service, it would be a good idea to introduce a pre-ordering app
If these changes are made, student satisfaction would improve significantly
A practical step would be to rotate the menu weekly with seasonal specials
The school should consider staggered lunch sittings to reduce crowding

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, these changes would improve satisfaction significantly
In conclusion, the cafeteria works well overall but variety and speed need improvement
To sum up, simple menu changes would make lunchtime more enjoyable for students
Overall, implementing the recommendations above would benefit all students
On the whole, the service is functional but falls short of what students need

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The aim of this report is to evaluate the Eco-Schools Green Flag initiative
This report examines the environmental awareness project that ran from September to December 2024
The purpose of this report is to assess achievements, challenges, and future recommendations
The report is based on feedback from 85 active participants
Information was collected through participant surveys and environmental impact data
This report covers activities undertaken, measurable outcomes, and lessons learned

subcategories.subtitle: Describing what happened
phrases: Overall, participants felt the project was worthwhile and well-organized
The highlight was undoubtedly receiving the Green Flag award at the end of term
One thing that worked really well was the school-wide recycling system
By far the best aspect was the planting of 50 trees around the campus
A definite strength was the enthusiasm shown by the majority of participants
It was generally agreed that the awareness assemblies were informative and engaging
Most students acknowledged that the project created visible and lasting improvements

subcategories.subtitle: Honest evaluation
phrases: The project successfully reduced school waste by 40% within three months
However, a common complaint was the initial resistance from some students
A significant concern was the time required to maintain new recycling systems
This is mainly due to the fact that the project relied on voluntary participation
As a result, some systems were difficult to sustain without dedicated coordinators
A persistent challenge was the limited budget, which restricted some planned activities
Many participants reported that the workload was heavier than anticipated

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing solutions
phrases: I would strongly recommend organizing similar environmental projects annually
One key recommendation would be to make environmental awareness an ongoing curriculum feature
In order to maintain momentum, it would be advisable to appoint student eco-representatives
To improve sustainability, it would be a good idea to integrate the project formally into lessons
If these changes are made, the long-term environmental benefits would be substantial
The school should consider allocating a dedicated budget for environmental initiatives
A practical step would be to link the project to science and geography coursework

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, the long-term benefits clearly outweigh the challenges
In conclusion, the project was a measurable success and should be continued
To sum up, embedding environmental initiatives into school life is both practical and beneficial
Overall, these recommendations would ensure the project has a lasting positive impact
On the whole, it was felt that the experience transformed students' attitudes to sustainability

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The purpose of this report is to review the youth club facilities on Mill Road
The aim of this report is to assess whether the club is meeting the needs of young people
This report is based on a survey of 95 current and former members
The report focuses on facilities, activities, and what would attract more members
Information was gathered through questionnaires and direct interviews with members
This report covers the 13 to 18 age group and proposes practical improvements

subcategories.subtitle: Balanced observations
phrases: It was generally felt that the games room is a popular feature among younger members
On the whole, the outdoor sports area is a valuable addition to the facilities
The consensus was that the art studio offers good creative opportunities
One positive aspect is the small café area which creates a social atmosphere
Overall, most users acknowledged that the club provides a useful community space
A definite strength is the central location within the community centre

subcategories.subtitle: Identifying concerns
phrases: However, one major problem is that activities are too limited for older teenagers
By far the worst aspect is the lack of Wi-Fi, which many members expect as standard
A significant concern amongst older members was that opening hours clash with school schedules
This is mainly due to the fact that the club closes before many students finish school
As a result, many potential members do not find the club accessible or relevant
A persistent problem is that gaming equipment has not been updated in several years
Many respondents stated that there are not enough activities tailored to their age group

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing solutions
phrases: One key recommendation would be to invest in modern music production equipment
I would strongly recommend installing Wi-Fi as an immediate priority
In order to attract more members, it would be advisable to open later on weekday evenings
To improve engagement, it would be a good idea to organize weekly sports tournaments
If these changes are made, membership could triple within a year
The community centre should consider consulting young people on what activities they want
A practical step would be to introduce a free trial membership to attract new visitors

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, these changes would significantly increase youth membership
In conclusion, the youth club is a valuable community resource that needs modernization
To sum up, targeted investment in equipment and hours would transform the club's appeal
Overall, implementing these recommendations would make the club relevant to more young people
On the whole, the club has strong potential but must adapt to meet the needs of teenagers today

subcategories.subtitle: Stating the aim
phrases: The aim of this report is to evaluate the intensive French course in Paris
This report looks at the teaching quality, materials, and overall effectiveness
The purpose of this report is to assess the course and suggest improvements
The report is based on feedback from the 12 international students in the class
The relevant information was obtained through participant surveys and teacher interviews
This report covers a three-week intensive course at the Paris Language Institute in August 2024

subcategories.subtitle: Describing the course
phrases: It was generally felt that the teaching was professional and well-structured
The highlight was undoubtedly the role-play exercises, which were highly engaging
One thing that worked really well was the focus on practical conversation skills
By far the best aspect was the use of qualified native-speaking teachers
A definite strength was the modern textbooks supported by quality audio resources
Students were especially impressed by the interactive whiteboard activities
Overall, most participants felt the teaching methods were varied and effective

subcategories.subtitle: Balanced evaluation
phrases: Speaking confidence improved dramatically over the three weeks
However, a common complaint was that the pace was sometimes too fast
A significant concern was that grammar explanations were occasionally unclear
This is mainly due to the fact that students entered with mixed ability levels
As a result, some students struggled to keep up while others felt unchallenged
A persistent problem was that four hours of daily study felt intensive for many
Many participants expressed frustration with the lack of ability-level differentiation

subcategories.subtitle: Proposing solutions
phrases: One key recommendation would be to provide clearer level assessment at the start
I would strongly recommend including more short breaks during the four-hour sessions
In order to support weaker students, it would be advisable to offer additional grammar sessions
To improve pace differentiation, it would be a good idea to group students by ability
If these changes are made, all students would progress more effectively
A practical step would be to conduct a placement test before the course begins
The institute should consider offering optional evening revision sessions for slower learners

subcategories.subtitle: Summarising findings
phrases: Taking everything into account, the course is excellent and well worth attending
In conclusion, the language gains were impressive but pacing needs to be addressed
To sum up, with these adjustments the course would be outstanding
Overall, students who complete the course leave with significantly improved confidence
On the whole, the programme represents a highly effective approach to language learning
